mapper.sql: select config_id, venue_id, start_time, end_time, is_enable, created_at, updated_at from duty_time_config
mapper.select: where venue_id = #{venueId} and is_enable = 1 order by start_time
mapper.insert: insert into duty_time_config (venue_id, start_time, end_time, is_enable, created_at, updated_at) values (#{venueId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{isEnable}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update duty_time_config set venue_id = #{venueId}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, is_enable = #{isEnable}, updated_at = now() where config_id = #{configId}
mapper.delete:
delete from duty_time_config where config_id in
#{configId}
